ddls:
CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code of the community area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community area */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value of the community area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the community area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the community area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated community area */,
  "age_25_over" INTEGER /* Number of individuals aged 25 or over */,
  "less_than_hs" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with less than a high school education */,
  "hs" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with a high school diploma */,
  "sc" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with some college education */,
  "bachelor" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with a bachelor's degree */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income of the community area */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Residence type of the community area */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the community area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Description of the income range */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the income range */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Description of the age range */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service entry */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area where the service is available */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the community service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the service (e.g., healthcare, education, housing) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the community service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_services_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_contacts_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., festival, meeting, workshop) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_events_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, community leader, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., community development, public health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area where the issue was reported */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., safety, infrastructure, environment) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_issues_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area where the initiative is implemented */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "initiative_type" TEXT /* Type of initiative (e.g., education, health, economic development) */,
  "initiative_description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_initiatives_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area where the resident lives */,
  "resident_name" TEXT /* Name of the resident */,
  "resident_age" INTEGER /* Age of the resident */,
  "resident_income" REAL /* Income of the resident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_residents_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area where the business is located */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., retail, food, service) */,
  "business_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_businesses_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_id")
)
